features: ONVIF Profile G, S, and T conformant
built-in high-power red and blue lights for visual deterrence
built-in speaker with preset and custom sounds for audio deterrence
line crossing with counting, intrusion detection, face/person/vehicle detection (full analytics list may require a compatible Speco recorder)
scene change, video blur, and missing-object (tamper) detection

frigate.notes: ONVIF Profile G/S/T conformance confirmed consistently across multiple retailer datasheets. Exact RTSP URL path not found in sources reviewed; use ONVIF auto-discovery or the camera's web UI.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF Profile G/S/T conformance confirmed consistently for this model.

blue_iris.notes: Strong ONVIF conformance makes this a likely good fit; not independently confirmed with Blue Iris specifically.
